name: dart-pro
description: Dart Pro – Scoring App mit KI-Coach

scripts.sync: mkdir -p www/js www/css && cp index.html www/ && cp -r js/. www/js/ && cp -r css/. www/css/ && npx cap sync android
scripts.build: mkdir -p www/js www/css && cp index.html www/ && cp -r js/. www/js/ && cp -r css/. www/css/ && npx cap sync android
